prompt:
Reference image role: the resume page prototype defines the visual DNA — moonlit tree-hollow study desk with an open scroll, hanging warm lanterns, a glowing round paper moon-window with cool moonlight, hanging sign, restrained Eastern xianxia mood. PRESERVE this DNA exactly. Banner-style hero (shorter than home page hero).

Create a wide hero banner for the resume page top section of "夕丰木". 16:9 wide format.

Composition:
- Right 55%: A study desk inside a tree hollow. Low dark wood desk with an unfurled paper scroll showing faint columns and ledger lines suggesting a resume document. A celadon teacup on the corner. A large round paper moon-window glowing cool moonlight over distant mountains. Two warm hanging lanterns. Mossy roots framing the cave mouth.
- Left 45%: Dark intentionally empty atmospheric area for page title "我的简历 / RESUME", small description, and download/contact buttons to be overlaid by HTML. NO text, NO UI in this image.

Color HEX: base #0B211D, wood #24180F, moss #33513A, lantern #ddb87a, moonlight #b8d4e0, firefly #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D.

Avoid: people, faces, readable text on the scroll, browser frames, navigation, oversaturated, neon, MMORPG, cartoonish.
